Hey guys, JB here. These weekend motivations are really about just giving you cool things to think about food for thought. Have a great day and let's do some serious butt kicking on Monday. All right, take care. Let me tell you something. I want you to start thinking of life and business like this. The best days are the ones where they're fraught with challenges and you're working to overcome them. The joy in life is overcoming challenges and obstacles. That's when I feel at my best when I'm not quite there yet. When I reach my goal, when I get to my end point, right? Okay, there's a bit of temporary, yeah, that's good, but that's not for me the fun is. The fun is the journey. The fun is trying to be right, figuring it out, pivoting, taking my mistakes and turning them into positives. Stop worrying about each result being right or wrong in terms of like that you feel good when your results are good and bad when your results are bad. That's ridiculous. The power is the journey. I always say the road to success is paved with what? Success. It's like, you know, the road to success is paved with successful acts. You know, you don't actually listen. You want to be great. The road to greatness is paved with greatness. You are what you do every single day. You're the sum of your daily actions. It's like you can be, you know, you can't act in an average way every day and achieve greatness. Average average, it's not like a sum of 20 average days because you work really hard. Let me work hard, but for a longer period of time and I'll get the greatness. No, greatness yields greatness. Goodness yields goodness. They don't transmute tature. I said a lot of goodness doesn't equal greatness. You have to go at life and attack it and embrace the challenges. Guys, I don't care if you're struggling right now. That's part of the fun of it. Oh, please. I promise you, take off my glove. I'm looking right in the eye. I was a little drunk, but I'm telling you flat out that in my life, the happiest days I've ever had is when I'm overcoming obstacles. I won't deny it. It's not when the shit hits the fan. Yeah, I get upset like you do, right? And then I have my moment where I have to grin and bear, right? But what I'm talking about is that from the bottom, when I hit that turning point, so I'm at the bottom, things are going away. And all of a sudden I hit that turning point and a sense of hope comes across me. It's all about how much hope you have. And once that hope takes hold, hope takes hold, it takes hold. Anything is possible. Just don't lose hope. And understand that you don't have to wait to get to where you're going to enjoy what's going to happen to you. You enjoy the ride. Stop worrying about the day to day results, the successes it has. It's the fucking journey. That's life. My best days are when I'm over, I want you to try this. Just try this on for size in your own life. Just try this, right? Try reframing what is really fun for you in business. Like what do you enjoy doing? Try to make it so, just try this on. That when you are overwhelmed, when you are trying to cut through 50 pounds of shit to get to where you want to go, that's the most fun you'll ever have. Try it. Instead of worrying about it and complaining about it, it's the overcoming of barriers and obstacles. That is the most fun thing of all. When the problems hit me, that sucks. I want to know that. And I grin it and I bear it.
